ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Continued To Dec-27-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Jeffrey Malek, Esq. for Plaintiff: First American Specialty Insurance Company.
Plaintiff's witness: Robert Stewart, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Thomas Joseph Carty and Carty Moving and Storage as follows:
Damages $30,346.85
Interest to be calculated.
Costs $452.00.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
